title: Avoid using ThreadGroup
description: The ThreadGroup class contains many deprecated methods and some non-deprecated methods are obsolete or not thread-safe. Also, some methods are insecure. Any use of ThreadGroup is suspicious and should be avoided.
recommendation: Avoid using ThreadGroup and use other thread management classes instead.
impact: Improves code quality, security, and thread safety.

checks.message: Avoid using ThreadGroup and use other thread management classes instead.
